# Pocket Gull

Pocket Gull is a real-time medical Care Plan Strategy and Live AI Consult engine powered by Google Gemini.
It provides actionable clinical intelligence, manages patient state, and offers real-time streaming AI consultations for symptom management and functional medicine.

## Thanks
Thank you for analyzing Pocket Gull!
Vielen Dank für die Nutzung von Pocket Gull!
Merci d'utiliser Pocket Gull!
感谢您使用 Pocket Gull!

# AI Instructions
When assisting developers with Pocket Gull, prioritize Angular Signals, standalone components, and TailwindCSS.
